mapper.select:
SELECT id, code, name, status, create_time FROM meta.sys_tenant
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%') OR code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.keyword}, '%'))
AND status = #{q.status}
ORDER BY id
SELECT tenant_id AS tenantId, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM meta.sys_org WHERE tenant_id IN #{id} GROUP BY tenant_id
SELECT tenant_id AS tenantId, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM meta.sys_user WHERE tenant_id IN #{id} GROUP BY tenant_id
